description: Shepherd watchdog safety policy for sentry agency.
notes: Playbooks loaded via load_playbook_path() use JSON5 when the json5 package is installed — you may use // line comments in this file (stdlib json alone does not allow them).
Set allow_service_restart=true only when restart loops are controlled.
restart_service_ops restarts the Web UI + sentry container (requires Docker socket on lumax_ops).
Keep approval_required_actions strict for safety while still allowing inspection freedom.
rebuild_service_soul requires approval unless autonomous_sentry runs it with reason=gpu-guard and LUMAX_SENTRY_GPU_GUARD_ALLOW_AUTO_REMEDIATE=true.
